name: Perditious Puppeteer
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>地</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>傀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>く</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>儡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぐつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Once per turn: You can discard 1 card; gain control of all face-up Level 3 or lower monsters your opponent controls, until the End Phase. These monsters cannot activate their effects, and cannot be Tributed or used as a Synchro Material Monster.
mnst_eff: Once per turn: You can discard 1 card; gain control of all face-up Level 3 or lower monsters your opponent controls, until the End Phase. These monsters cannot activate their effects, and cannot be Tributed or used as a Synchro Material Monster.
eff: Once per turn: You can discard 1 card; gain control of all face-up Level 3 or lower monsters your opponent controls, until the End Phase. These monsters cannot activate their effects, and cannot be Tributed or used as a Synchro Material Monster.

action: Takes control of an opponent's monster
mst: Prevents activation of your Effect Monsters
summoning: Cannot be used as a Synchro Material
